framework.name: DORA French Implementation - Digital Operational Resilience
framework.name_nl: Mise en oeuvre francaise de DORA - Resilience operationnelle numerique
framework.scope: French implementation of EU Regulation 2022/2554 on digital operational resilience for the financial sector
framework.structure_description: Requirements covering ICT risk management, incident reporting, digital resilience testing, third-party ICT risk, and information sharing.

controls.title: ICT risk management framework
controls.title_nl: Cadre de gestion des risques TIC
controls.description: Establish a comprehensive ICT risk management framework approved by the management body, reviewed annually.
controls.description_nl: Etablir un cadre complet de gestion des risques TIC approuve par l'organe de direction, reexamine annuellement.

controls.title: ICT asset classification and mapping
controls.title_nl: Classification et cartographie des actifs TIC
controls.description: Identify, classify, and document all ICT assets, systems, and their interconnections supporting critical functions.
controls.description_nl: Identifier, classifier et documenter tous les actifs TIC, systemes et leurs interconnexions supportant les fonctions critiques.

controls.title: ICT security policies and standards
controls.title_nl: Politiques et normes de securite TIC
controls.description: Maintain ICT security policies covering network security, data protection, encryption, access control, and patch management.
controls.description_nl: Maintenir des politiques de securite TIC couvrant la securite reseau, la protection des donnees, le chiffrement, le controle d'acces et la gestion des correctifs.

controls.title: ICT business continuity policy
controls.description: Develop ICT business continuity policies with defined recovery time and recovery point objectives.
controls.description_nl: Developper des politiques de continuite d'activite TIC avec des objectifs de temps de recuperation et de point de recuperation definis.

controls.title: ICT response and recovery plans
controls.title_nl: Plans de reponse et de recuperation TIC
controls.description: Maintain documented ICT response and recovery plans tested at least annually through realistic scenarios.
controls.description_nl: Maintenir des plans de reponse et de recuperation TIC documentes, testes au moins annuellement par des scenarios realistes.

controls.title: ICT incident classification
controls.description: Classify ICT incidents using defined criteria: number of clients affected, data loss, service downtime, geographic spread.
controls.description_nl: Classifier les incidents TIC selon des criteres definis : nombre de clients affectes, perte de donnees, indisponibilite de service, etendue geographique.

controls.title: Major incident notification
controls.description: Notify the competent authority (ACPR/AMF) of major ICT incidents using the defined reporting templates and timelines.
controls.description_nl: Notifier l'autorite competente (ACPR/AMF) des incidents TIC majeurs en utilisant les modeles et delais de reporting definis.

controls.title: Incident root cause analysis
controls.title_nl: Analyse des causes profondes des incidents
controls.description: Conduct root cause analysis for all major ICT incidents and implement corrective measures to prevent recurrence.
controls.description_nl: Conduire une analyse des causes profondes pour tous les incidents TIC majeurs et mettre en oeuvre des mesures correctives pour prevenir la recurrence.

controls.title: Digital resilience testing program
controls.title_nl: Programme de tests de resilience numerique
controls.description: Establish a risk-based digital resilience testing program including vulnerability scanning, network security, and gap analysis.
controls.description_nl: Etablir un programme de tests de resilience numerique base sur les risques incluant l'analyse de vulnerabilites, la securite reseau et l'analyse des ecarts.

controls.title: Threat-led penetration testing (TLPT)
controls.title_nl: Tests d'intrusion pilotes par les menaces (TLPT)
controls.description: Significant entities shall conduct threat-led penetration testing (TIBER-EU framework) at least every 3 years.
controls.description_nl: Les entites significatives doivent conduire des tests d'intrusion pilotes par les menaces (cadre TIBER-EU) au moins tous les 3 ans.

controls.title: ICT third-party risk register
controls.description: Maintain a register of all contractual arrangements with ICT third-party providers with risk assessments.
controls.description_nl: Maintenir un registre de tous les arrangements contractuels avec les prestataires tiers TIC avec des evaluations de risques.

controls.title: Critical ICT provider oversight
controls.description: Implement enhanced due diligence and monitoring for critical or important ICT third-party providers.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre une diligence raisonnable et une surveillance renforcees pour les prestataires tiers TIC critiques ou importants.

controls.title: Exit strategy for critical ICT providers
controls.title_nl: Strategie de sortie pour les prestataires TIC critiques
controls.description: Develop and maintain exit strategies for critical ICT providers ensuring continuity of critical functions.
controls.description_nl: Developper et maintenir des strategies de sortie pour les prestataires TIC critiques assurant la continuite des fonctions critiques.
